name: Strawberry Bon-Bons
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk, coconut, 1/3 cup gelatin, almonds, almond extract, and red food coloring in a bowl until tinted to the desired shade.
2. Chill mixture for one hour.
3. Using half a tablespoon of the mix, form strawberry shapes on wax paper.
4. Sprinkle remaining gelatin onto waxed paper; roll strawberries to coat them lightly.
5. In a small bowl, combine confectioner's sugar, heavy cream, and green food coloring.
6. Pipe leaves on top of each strawberry using a pastry bag with an open star tip.
7. Place bon-bons on wax paper-lined baking sheets.
8. Chill for one hour before storing covered at room temperature.
